title: monella collina
intro: Monella collina, also known as Monella or Common Monella, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Monella collina include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and calm digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Monella collina often take the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications and dosages to suit individual needs.
